rulings.Case Title: J&R SAN FRANCISCO, INC. et al VS. CHO QUON FUNG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Ptlf Against Defts
rulings.Rulings: TENTATIVE RULING: HOUSING COURT LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR APRIL 10, 2014, Line1. DEFENDANT MEREDITH FONDAH's Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Plaintiff Against Defendants DENIED as there is a potential for inconsistent ruling by arbitrator and trial court and a cause of action that cannot be sent to arbitration. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTINA WONG VS. THE HARRISON TEAM et al
rulings.Rulings: TENTATIVE RULING: HOUSING COURT LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR APRIL 10, Line 4. DEFENDANT LINDA HARRISON and ELLEN ANDERSON's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Plaintiff is seeking specific performance from a wrong party. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WALTER RICCI VS. CASIMIRO LAMAS et al
rulings.Rulings: TENTATIVE RULING: HOUSING COURT LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR APRIL 10, Line 5. DEFENDANT CASIMIRO LAMAS and ANGELINA LAMAS' MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT GRANTED as Memo to Set Trial and Notice of Trial were sent to wrong address, i.e. "458 15th Street" v. "1458 15th Street". Parties to meet and confer on new trial date. =(501/REQ)
